title: Help me with request to API
excerpt:
I have a problem with requests to api. 
I recive responces with HTML with Cloudflare code. 
How can i handle this problem? 
Here is screen from Postman

posts.author: Nixoid (Nixoid)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a problem with requests to api.
I recive responces with HTML with Cloudflare code.
How can i handle this problem?
Here is screen from Postman

1510×1236 118 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Nixoid!

Could you please send us an email to appsupport@monday.com with all the relevant information so we can take a closer look?

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Nixoid (Nixoid)
posts.cookedHtml: @Matias.Monday I have sent you an email.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi Mattias,

That looks a lot like the one I still get occasionally

In my opinion we should never get a full HTML document on error

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @basdebruin!

Thank you for the feedback!

It has been shared with our team and it is under review

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Nixoid (Nixoid)
posts.cookedHtml:
ok.
I can use api with vpn.
i think this problem connected to my internet provider actions
